attributes.action: Stop all offensive military action taking place by the usa using UK facilities.
attributes.additional_details:
The USA has demonstrated time again it is no longer a trusted ally. It has threatened and insulted the UK & NATO several times.  

The USA should  NOT be allowed to get away with abusive behaviour and should not be allowed to put the UK in danger by the stupidity of its actions. 

A vote in favour of allowing the USA to carry out offensive actions must pass in parliament before military action by the USA. The say so from the Prime Minister is no longer enough.
attributes.background:
The UK has allowed the USA to have a large number of military installations on UK RAF bases.  

Unless parliament votes in favour, no offensive action should be allowed using those base by the USA military

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
